input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.12.10.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: d.12.10.3
            TITLE: the amount of time spent in the driver change area is at the discretion of the officials.

            CONTENT:
            rule D.12.10.3: The amount of time spent in the Driver Change Area is at the discretion of the officials.
D.12.10.3 The amount of time spent in the Driver Change Area is at the discretion of the officials.

final_answer: The amount of time spent in the Driver Change Area is at the discretion of the officials.
